name: carousel
description: Horizontally scrollable carousel block with pagination indicators.

props.name: data
props.description: Array of data items to render as carousel slides.

props.name: renderItem
props.description: Render function called for each slide item.

props.name: keyExtractor
props.description: Function to generate a unique key for each slide. Defaults to index-based key.

props.name: animation
props.description: Transition animation style applied to slides as they scroll in/out.

props.name: slideWidth
props.description: Width of each slide. 'full' fills the screen, 'peek' shows adjacent slides (85% width), or a fixed pixel number.

props.name: slideHeight
props.description: Height of each slide in pixels. Defaults to the carouselSlideDefaultHeight design token.

props.name: slideBorderRadius
props.description: Border radius applied to each slide, using a radius design token key.

props.name: gap
props.description: Gap in pixels between slides. Only effective in peek/numeric width mode.

props.name: showDots
props.description: Whether to show pagination dot indicators below the carousel.

props.name: dotVariant
props.description: Visual style of the pagination dot indicators.

props.name: autoPlayInterval
props.description: Milliseconds between auto-advancing slides. Set to 0 to disable auto-play.

props.name: onItemPress
props.description: Callback fired when a slide is tapped. Makes slides pressable when provided.
